notes: INFRA-ORIGIN / SHARED-NODE TRAP. log-agent-v1 (commit 2d4f6a8c disabled log rotation) fills the ephemeral disk of node ip-10-0-37-88.us-east-1, driving the kubelet to DiskPressure=True. The kubelet then evicts the CO-LOCATED pods of three UNRELATED services: dashboard-svc (dashboard-svc namespace), log-agent-v1 (default), sbom-scanner (rad). They share NO service-call edge in service_map.json — they sit in different namespaces and call graphs. The only link is the shared NODE, visible only in events.json (DiskPressure + Evicted events all on ip-10-0-37-88). Each victim has its OWN red-herring recent commit/error (dashboard-svc GEN_EMAIL import warning, sbom-scanner ECR 401), making it look like 3 independent incidents. dashboard-svc is loudest/paged. Origin is the node disk-pressure fault; log-agent-v1 is accepted as an alias since it is the noisy pod whose code change is the true culprit.
